playbook_patterns.symptom: linarith fails on term1 upper bound when oracle shows term1 ≈ -0.2
playbook_patterns.physics_cause: Observer/quirk boosts term1 toward zero; dispersal is weak, not strong.
playbook_patterns.fix: Switch to term1 > -0.8 lower bound + raw_S_positive_of_term1_gt_neg_08

playbook_patterns.symptom: growth_term / rexp mismatch in medical proof
playbook_patterns.fix: Use growth_term_hits_one (or domain-specific) bounds, not hits=0 template

playbook_patterns.symptom: term1 < 0 proved but raw_S sign still ambiguous
playbook_patterns.physics_cause: term2 = 1 is a positive floor; need |term1| > 1 + |term3|

playbook_patterns.symptom: Sign flip between raw_S and scaled_S = k · raw_S
playbook_patterns.physics_cause: k > 0 is positive scale factor; signs agree but magnitudes differ
playbook_patterns.fix: Prove on raw_S; scaled sign follows from k_pos
